latin: Tunicam veterem ex armario extraxi quam per annum non gestaveram. manum in sinum inserui et — ecce! — viginti nummos inveni. tam laetus eram ut saltarem. divitiae celatas in domo mea habebam.

questions.prompt: How long had the jacket been unworn?
How does the narrator react to finding money?

translation: I pulled out an old jacket from the closet that I had not worn for a year. I put my hand in the pocket and — behold! — I found twenty coins. I was so happy that I danced. I had hidden riches in my own house.
